summary: First full-stack test of Vaultedge Outreach Hub. All 17 backend pytest cases pass (auth cookies, people query with in/not_in campaign filters, campaigns, companies, stats overview, chat via Claude Sonnet 4.5, sheets 503 graceful, mapping suggestion for unusual headers, de-dup import commit for Bhargav, add-person-to-campaign heads-up, CSV export). All critical frontend flows work: login prefilled + redirect, People table with 20 dense rows and campaign chips, Person detail panel, in/not-in campaign popovers listing all 7 seeded campaigns, Import page with GSheets 'not configured' banner, Duplicates empty state, Dashboard stat cards, and Chat Assistant returning 4 HDFC results with campaign chips inside the chat bubble.
action_items: Optional polish: add a data-testid to the sidebar logout button (currently only findable as the small icon-only button next to the admin email footer). Backend /api/auth/logout endpoint itself works.

Optional: The chat input at bottom of ChatPanel would benefit from a data-testid="chat-input" and the send button data-testid="chat-send" to make automation more reliable — clicking a suggestion chip works but typing free-form via the last input/textarea selector is brittle.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1400+ lines — consider splitting into routers (auth.py, people.py, import.py, chat.py, sheets.py) for maintainability.

In _build_people_query, when in_campaigns has multiple ids, the code runs one $in per id and appends multiple {_id:$in} clauses (intersected via $and). Works correctly but is O(N) db queries — could be a single $group aggregation.
chat_query imports emergentintegrations inside the function on every request — cheap but consider hoisting import to module level.
STAGED dict is in-process memory only. If the backend restarts or scales to multiple workers, upload tokens will be lost. Acceptable for internal tool but worth noting.
Cookies are set with secure=True which requires HTTPS. This is correct for the preview/prod ingress but will silently drop cookies if anyone hits the backend over plain HTTP locally.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows pass, logout button lacks obvious testid)

seed_data_creation: Test uses a temporary campaign 'Testing Overlap {ts}' during the dedup test and deletes it in cleanup so stats remain at 7 campaigns / 20 people.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest is at /app/backend/tests/test_vaultedge_backend.py (uses xdist -n 2 --dist loadscope from /app/backend/pytest.ini). BASE_URL is taken from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — export it before running: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://contact-unify.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_vaultedge_backend.py -v. Chat test uses real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (Claude Sonnet 4.5). Google Sheets is intentionally not configured (GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET empty). Frontend: chat input lacks data-testid; the sidebar logout icon lacks data-testid too — main agent should add these for stable future automation.
